message:
test(frankenterm-core): add conformance fixtures for ECH, wrap, insert/delete, scroll region (bd-lff4p.1.12)

New fixture categories:
- erase_chars: ECH basic, default (1 char), clamp at EOL
- wrap_behavior: wrap at margin, pending wrap cleared by cursor move,
  wrap + scroll at bottom, overwrite at right margin
- line_edit: ICH at margin, DCH overflow
- scroll_region: IL and DL within scroll regions

Fix pre-existing scroll fixtures (scroll_up_multi, scroll_down_multi):
correct expected cursor from (3,1) to (3,2) and X cell from col 0 to col 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "ech_basic",
+  "description": "ECH (CSI 3X) erases 3 characters at cursor without moving it",
+  "initial_size": [80, 24],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b32471b5b3358",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE (cursor at col 5), CHA(2) to col 1, ECH(3) erases cols 1-3, cursor stays at col 1",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "ech_clamp_eol",
+  "description": "ECH count larger than remaining columns is clamped to line width",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243441b5b33471b5b323058",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD (cursor at col 4), CHA(3) to col 2, ECH(20) erases cols 2-9 (clamped), cursor stays at col 2",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "delete_chars_overflow",
+  "description": "DCH count larger than remaining characters effectively clears to end of line",
+  "initial_size": [8, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b313b33481b5b313050",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE. CUP(1,3) to (0,2). DCH(10) deletes from col 2, but only 6 cols remain. Result: AB followed by blanks.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "insert_chars_at_margin",
+  "description": "ICH near right margin pushes content off screen; excess is lost",
+  "initial_size": [8, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344454647481b5b313b37481b5b334058",
+  "comment": "Fill 8 cols ABCDEFGH. CUP(1,7) to (0,6). ICH(3) inserts 3 blanks at col 6, GH pushed off right. Print X at col 6.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 7 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 6, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 7, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "delete_line_in_region",
+  "description": "DL inside a scroll region removes cursor line and pulls content up within the region only",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41414141414141414141424242424242424242424343434343434343434344444444444444444444454545454545454545451b5b323b34721b5b323b31481b5b4d",
+  "comment": "Fill 5 rows with A-E. Set scroll region rows 2-4 (CSI 2;4 r, top=1 bottom=4). CUP(2,1) to (1,0). DL(1) deletes row 1, pulls C->1, D->2, blank at row 3. Row 4 (E) unchanged.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "insert_line_in_region",
+  "description": "IL inside a scroll region inserts blank line and pushes content down within the region only",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41414141414141414141424242424242424242424343434343434343434344444444444444444444454545454545454545451b5b323b34721b5b323b31481b5b4c",
+  "comment": "Fill 5 rows with A-E. Set scroll region rows 2-4 (CSI 2;4 r). CUP(2,1) to (1,0). IL(1) inserts blank at row 1, pushes B->2, C->3, D lost. Row 4 (E) outside region, unchanged.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "wrap_scrolls_at_bottom",
+  "description": "Wrapping at the bottom row triggers scroll up; top row content is lost",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142434445464748494a4b4c4d4e4f505152535455565758595a3031323321",
+  "comment": "Fill 3x10 grid (30 chars ABCDEFGHIJ..0123), print '!' wraps+scrolls. After scroll: row0=KLMNOPQRST, row1=UVWXYZ0123, row2=!",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "K" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": "T" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "U" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 9, "char": "3" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "!" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
